name: Old National Events Plaza
message: The impressive 280,000 square-foot, state-of-the-art facility, offers affordable, flexible space and in-house services to make theplanning and coordinating of your event a breeze.We are ready to upload a lot of sensitive corporate documents such as: confidential licenses, agreements and contracts, financial data (audits, payment details, reports), contact numbers and e-mail addresses of employees and customers, etc.
